[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-05-25
[TITLE]: Fact Check: Did Putin Start Wearing Bulletproof Jackets After Ukraine War
[METADATA/INTRO]: A picture of Russian President Vladimir Putin is becoming very viral on social media. In which he can be seen wearing a tight suit jacket. The picture claimed that Putin started wearing a bulletproof jacket after the Ukraine war. Sharing...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Giving information about the picture, the Russian outlet wrote that this picture was taken by photojournalist Gleb Shchelkunov on August 4, 2017. When Putin reached Lake Baikal during his election campaign. 
 However, looking at the picture in general, it is not possible to determine whether the wrinkles on Putin’s suit came from wearing the bulletproof jacket underneath. 
 Hence the claim made with the viral picture is misleading. Because this photo was taken not after the Russian invasion of Ukraine in May 2022, but during Putin’s election campaign on August 4, 2017. 
 | Claim Review: Russian President Vladimir Putin started wearing bulletproof jackets after the Ukraine war.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Body language experts break down Trump-Putin handshake, greeting before and after high-stakes showdown - AOL
[METADATA/INTRO]: Body language experts break down Trump-Putin handshake, greeting before and after high-stakes showdown President Trump showed a “genuine connection” with Russian President Vladimir Putin as the two leaders met on the tarmac at Joint Base Elmendorf-Richardson in Alaska, a body...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: “With Vladimir Putin … we also see a quick hand inside the jacket. Now we see him do this a couple of times,” Dawson went on, later adding: “When we see this, we know that this is more about what’s going on inside emotionally. And again, it’s kind of like a cross-body action. So we have that similar idea of protecting the torso, protecting the heart in a very slightly different way.” 
 When the time came for the leaders to greet each other, Dawson noticed that Putin had “a genuine smile” on his face. 
 “He looks genuinely happy to see Donald Trump, and we see him coming across the tarmac looking directly at Donald Trump,” she said.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-07-20
[TITLE]: Vladimir Putin's Arm Appears To Hang Limp As He Emerges From Plane In Tehran
[METADATA/INTRO]: Russian President Vladimir Putin was caught on video wobbling down the steps of his jet that touched down in Iran on Tuesday. The leader stepped onto the red carpet shuffling and limping as he was welcomed by waving crowds at...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: This time, Kremlin observers say his right arm appeared to be limp by his side as he trudged down the red carpet. Oddly enough, his watch was in his right hand although he is right-handed. His steps seemed unsteady but managed to wave briefly at the gathered crowd before leaving the tarmac with this presidential convoy, The Sun reported. 
 This is the second time the leader has made a trip outside of Russia since launching his “special military operations” in Ukraine five months ago. His meeting with Khameini comes following warnings from the U.S. last week that Iran has made preparations to sell drones to Russia. The said drones will be used in Ukraine to beef up its military operations.
